roadmap.title: First hours on the surface
roadmap.description: Gather wood, build a home for your first NPC, survive night one, and pick up the early trivial unlocks while you set up basic crafting and gear.

roadmap.title: Going underground
roadmap.description: Delve into the caverns, beat the pre-Hardmode bosses (Eye of Cthulhu, both world-evils, Queen Bee, Skeletron, King Slime), and dig down to the Underworld.

roadmap.title: Wall of Flesh & Hardmode
roadmap.description: Bridge the Underworld, defeat the Wall of Flesh to unleash Hardmode, smash altars for new ore.

roadmap.title: Hardmode mechanical bosses
roadmap.description: Gear up for the three mechanical menaces, craft the Drax, and start mining Chlorophyte.

roadmap.title: Plantera, Temple & Golem
roadmap.description: Beat Plantera to open the Jungle Temple, defeat Golem, and raid the empowered Dungeon.

roadmap.title: Lunar endgame
roadmap.description: Down Duke Fishron and the Lunatic Cultist, topple the Celestial Pillars, and slay the Moon Lord.

roadmap.title: Post-Moon Lord mastery
roadmap.description: Forge the game's ultimate gear — Zenith, Terrarian, Cell Phone/Shellphone, Ankh Shield — and max out your stats.

roadmap.title: Events, invasions & extra bosses
roadmap.description: Clear the recurring events, invasions and seasonal/optional bosses that can be tackled throughout Hardmode.

roadmap.title: Odd jobs & rare finds
roadmap.description: Rare enemies, quirky one-off actions, and quality-of-life unlocks you can knock out any time.

roadmap.title: Fishing & the Angler grind
roadmap.description: Work through the Angler's daily quests all the way to 200 for the game's biggest grind.

roadmap.title: Long-haul collections
roadmap.description: The cumulative and completionist goals: every boss, every slime, the full Bestiary, world purification and more.

roadmap.title: Secret-seed challenges
roadmap.description: Special-seed worlds (getfixedboi, For the Worthy, Vampirism, Drunk, The Constant) needed for the toughest 1.4.5 achievements.

achievements.description: Chop down your first tree.
achievements.summary: Swing an axe at any @loc{tree} to gather your first @item{wood}.

guide.context: A new character starts with a Copper Axe. The achievement checks that you obtain ordinary wood, so the first surface tree is the quickest source.

steps.text: Select the @item{Copper Axe}, hold the use button on the lowest trunk tiles until the tree falls, then pick up at least one @item{Wood}.

achievements.description: Build a house suitable enough for your first town NPC, such as the guide, to move into.
achievements.summary: Build a valid house so your first @npc{town NPC} moves in.

guide.context: The achievement unlocks when a town NPC claims valid housing—not merely when the room is built. A simple wooden room needs an enclosed frame, player-placed background walls, an entrance, light, one comfort item, and one flat-surface item.

steps.text: Build an enclosed room of at least @mechanic{60 total tiles} including its frame; a 6×10 exterior is an easy valid size.
Fill every interior opening with player-placed @item{background walls}, then add a @item{Wooden Door}, @item{Torch}, @item{Chair}, and @item{Work Bench}.
Open the @mechanic{Housing menu}, select the question-mark tool, and click inside the room; continue only when Terraria reports that the housing is suitable.
Assign the @npc{Guide} to the room from the Housing menu, or leave it vacant and wait for an eligible town NPC to move in.
steps.note: The achievement appears when the NPC actually occupies/claims the valid house.

achievements.description: Obtain your first hammer via crafting or otherwise.
achievements.summary: Get your first @item{hammer} by crafting or looting one.

guide.context: Use the guaranteed early recipe instead of waiting for random loot. A Wooden Hammer requires only Wood and a placed Work Bench.

steps.text: Stand beside a placed @item{Work Bench} and craft a @item{Wooden Hammer} from @item{8 Wood}.
steps.note: Move the crafted hammer into your inventory; obtaining it triggers the achievement.

achievements.description: Mine your first nugget of ore with a pickaxe.
achievements.summary: Mine your first @item{ore} nugget with a @item{pickaxe}.

guide.context: Copper, Tin, Iron or Lead veins appear just below the surface.

steps.text: Dig down and mine any @item{ore} vein with your @item{pickaxe}.

achievements.description: Discover and smash your first heart crystal underground.
achievements.summary: Mine a placed @item{Life Crystal}; consuming it is a separate action.

guide.context: Life Crystals are 2×2 red hearts naturally embedded in the Underground and Cavern layers. The achievement checks the placed crystal being broken—not obtaining or consuming the item afterward.

steps.text: Equip a @item{pickaxe} and mine the placed @item{Life Crystal} until it breaks.
steps.note: Do not actuate the blocks beneath it; that does not satisfy the achievement check. Consuming the dropped Life Crystal is optional for this achievement.

achievements.description: Obtain an anvil made from iron or lead.
achievements.summary: Craft an @item{Iron} or @item{Lead Anvil}.

guide.context: The achievement accepts either an Iron Anvil or Lead Anvil. Crafting one is reliable; an Iron Anvil can also appear in an Underground Cabin or be bought from the Merchant for 50 silver.

steps.text: Mine @item{15 Iron Ore or Lead Ore}, then stand beside a @item{Furnace} and smelt it into @item{5 matching Bars}.
Stand beside a @item{Work Bench} and craft an @item{Iron Anvil or Lead Anvil} from the @item{5 Bars}.
steps.note: The achievement triggers when the anvil enters your inventory; placing it is unnecessary.

achievements.description: Discover a golden chest underground and take a peek at its contents.
achievements.summary: Open a @item{Gold Chest} found underground.

guide.context: Gold Chests spawn throughout the caverns with useful early loot.

steps.text: Explore caves until you find a @item{Gold Chest} and open it.

achievements.description: Craft a mana crystal out of fallen stars, and consume it.
achievements.summary: Craft and consume a @item{Mana Crystal}.

guide.context: @item{Fallen Stars} drop across the surface at night. Five of them make a Mana Crystal.

steps.text: Collect @item{5 Fallen Stars} (they fall at night).
Craft a @item{Mana Crystal} and consume it for +20 max mana.

achievements.description: Equip your first grappling hook.
achievements.summary: Equip your first @item{grappling hook}.

guide.context: The achievement requires a hook in the dedicated grappling-hook equipment slot. A reliable early recipe is any Gem Hook, crafted from 15 matching gems at an Iron or Lead Anvil.

steps.text: Mine @item{15 of one gem type}—for example, 15 Amethyst—then craft the matching @item{Gem Hook} at an @item{Iron or Lead Anvil}.
Open the equipment screen and place the hook in the dedicated @mechanic{grappling-hook slot}, not a normal accessory slot.
steps.note: The achievement triggers when the hook is equipped in that slot.

achievements.description: Defeat the Eye of Cthulhu, an ocular menace who only appears at night.
achievements.summary: Defeat the @enemy{Eye of Cthulhu}, the first major boss.

guide.context: Use a Suspicious Looking Eye at night for a controlled summon. Using it during daytime does nothing, and the Eye of Cthulhu escapes at dawn if not defeated.

steps.text: Kill surface @enemy{Demon Eyes} for @item{6 Lenses}, then craft a @item{Suspicious Looking Eye} at a @item{Demon or Crimson Altar}.
After night begins, use the @item{Suspicious Looking Eye} on the surface and defeat @enemy{Eye of Cthulhu} before dawn.

achievements.description: Using explosives or your trusty hammer, smash a Shadow Orb or Crimson Heart in the evil parts of your world.
achievements.summary: Break one of your evil biome's protected objects: a @item{Shadow Orb} or @item{Crimson Heart}.

guide.context: Shadow Orbs sit behind Ebonstone in Corruption chasms; Crimson Hearts sit behind Crimstone in Crimson tunnels. Early pickaxes cannot mine those blocks, so explosives are the simplest way to reach one.

steps.text: Follow a chasm/tunnel underground until you can see a @item{Shadow Orb or Crimson Heart}, then use @item{Bombs or Dynamite} to open the surrounding evil stone.
Equip any @item{hammer} and strike the exposed Orb/Heart until it breaks.
steps.note: The first break unlocks the achievement. Breaking the third in one world immediately summons that evil biome's boss.

achievements.description: Defeat the Eater of Worlds, a massive worm whom dwells in the corruption.
achievements.summary: Defeat the @enemy{Eater of Worlds} in the @loc{Corruption}.

guide.context: This is the Corruption world-evil boss. Summon it by smashing three Shadow Orbs or using @item{Worm Food}.

steps.text: In a @loc{Corruption} world, break @item{3 Shadow Orbs}; the third break summons @enemy{Eater of Worlds} immediately.
Stay inside the @loc{Corruption} and destroy every remaining worm segment to complete the boss kill.
steps.note: Corruption worlds only; a Crimson world needs Brain of Cthulhu instead.

achievements.description: Defeat the Brain of Cthulhu, an enourmous demon brain which haunts the creeping crimson.
achievements.summary: Defeat the @enemy{Brain of Cthulhu} in the @loc{Crimson}.

guide.context: This is the Crimson world-evil boss. Summon by smashing three Crimson Hearts or using a @item{Bloody Spine}.

steps.text: In a @loc{Crimson} world, break @item{3 Crimson Hearts}; the third break summons @enemy{Brain of Cthulhu} immediately.
Kill every orbiting @enemy{Creeper} to make the Brain vulnerable, then reduce the Brain's health to zero.
steps.note: Crimson worlds only; you will need a Crimson world alongside a Corruption one for full completion.

achievements.description: Discover a large bee's hive deep in the jungle.
achievements.summary: Find a large @loc{Bee Hive} in the underground @loc{Jungle}.

guide.context: Hives are honey-filled pockets deep in the Jungle, holding a @item{Larva} that summons Queen Bee.

steps.text: Explore the underground @loc{Jungle} until you enter a @loc{Bee Hive}.

achievements.description: Defeat the Queen Bee, the matriarch of the jungle hives.
achievements.summary: Defeat the @enemy{Queen Bee}, matriarch of the Jungle.

guide.context: Break a @item{Larva} inside a hive, or use an @item{Abeemination} anywhere in the Jungle.

steps.text: Inside an underground Jungle @loc{Bee Hive}, prepare space to fight before touching the @item{Larva}; mining or attacking the Larva summons @enemy{Queen Bee} immediately.
Remain in the @loc{Jungle} and reduce @enemy{Queen Bee}'s health to zero.

achievements.description: Defeat Skeletron, the cursed guardian of the dungeon.
achievements.summary: Defeat @enemy{Skeletron}, guardian of the @loc{Dungeon}.

guide.context: The @npc{Old Man} stands directly outside the @loc{Dungeon entrance}. His boss-summon dialogue is available only at night.

steps.text: At night, speak to the @npc{Old Man} and select @mechanic{Curse}.
steps.note: Selecting Curse closes the dialogue and summons @enemy{Skeletron} immediately.

steps.text: Defeat the summoned @enemy{Skeletron} to unlock Boned.

achievements.description: Steal a key from the dungeon's undead denizens, and unlock one of their precious golden chests.
achievements.summary: Open a @item{Gold Chest} inside the @loc{Dungeon} with a @item{Golden Key}.

guide.context: After Skeletron is defeated, enter below the Dungeon's surface level. A Dungeon Slime always drops one Golden Key; ordinary pre-Plantera Dungeon enemies have a much smaller chance.

steps.text: Find and kill a @enemy{Dungeon Slime} inside the @loc{Dungeon}, then pick up its guaranteed @item{Golden Key}.
With the key in your inventory, use it on any locked @item{Gold Chest} inside the @loc{Dungeon}.
steps.note: The chest consumes one Golden Key and unlocks the achievement when opened.

achievements.description: Spelunk deep enough to reach the molten underworld.
achievements.summary: Descend all the way to the @loc{Underworld}.

guide.context: The Underworld is the lava-filled bottom layer of every world.

steps.text: Dig or drop down until you reach the @loc{Underworld}.
steps.note: Bring lava-safe gear and a way back up.

achievements.description: Craft a molten pickaxe using the hottest of materials.
achievements.summary: Craft a @item{Molten Pickaxe} from the hottest materials.

guide.context: Hellstone needs at least 65% pickaxe power: defeat Eater of Worlds for a Nightmare Pickaxe or Brain of Cthulhu for a Deathbringer Pickaxe. Lava and burning blocks make an Obsidian Skin Potion the safest mining setup.

steps.text: At an @item{Iron or Lead Anvil}, craft a @item{Nightmare Pickaxe} from 12 Demonite Bars + 6 Shadow Scales, or a @item{Deathbringer Pickaxe} from 12 Crimtane Bars + 6 Tissue Samples.
At a Placed Bottle or Alchemy Table, craft @item{Obsidian Skin Potions} from Bottled Water, Fireblossom, Waterleaf, and Obsidian; drink one before entering lava pockets.
With the capable pickaxe, mine @item{60 Hellstone} in the @loc{Underworld}; combine water and lava elsewhere and mine @item{20 Obsidian}.
Stand beside a @item{Hellforge} and smelt @item{20 Hellstone Bars}, using 3 Hellstone + 1 Obsidian per bar.
At an @item{Iron or Lead Anvil}, craft the @item{Molten Pickaxe} from all @item{20 Hellstone Bars}.

achievements.description: Defeat the Wall of Flesh, the master and core of the world who arises after a great, burning sacrifice.
achievements.summary: Defeat the @enemy{Wall of Flesh} in the @loc{Underworld}.

guide.context: A Voodoo Demon in the Underworld drops the Guide Voodoo Doll. The Guide NPC must be alive when the doll is destroyed in Underworld lava; the sacrifice kills the Guide and summons the Wall of Flesh immediately.

steps.text: Confirm that the @npc{Guide} is alive, then kill @enemy{Voodoo Demons} in the @loc{Underworld} until one drops a @item{Guide Voodoo Doll}.
Prepare a long horizontal route through the @loc{Underworld}, then drop the @item{Guide Voodoo Doll} from your inventory into Underworld lava.
Move away from the advancing @enemy{Wall of Flesh} while attacking its eyes or mouth until its health reaches zero.
steps.note: The boss cannot be escaped by leaving the Underworld; defeating it both unlocks Still Hungry and converts the world to Hardmode.

achievements.description: Unleash the ancient spirits of light and darkness across your world, enabling much stronger foes and showering the world with dazzling treasures (and rainbows!).
achievements.summary: Trigger @mechanic{Hardmode} by beating the Wall of Flesh.

guide.context: Unlocks automatically the moment the Wall of Flesh dies for the first time, unleashing stronger foes.

steps.text: Defeat the @enemy{Wall of Flesh} to enter @mechanic{Hardmode}.

achievements.description: Smash a demon or crimson altar with a powerful, holy hammer.
achievements.summary: Use the @item{Pwnhammer} to break an evil altar of either type.

guide.context: The Wall of Flesh drops the Pwnhammer, which lets you destroy altars and seed the world with new ore.

steps.text: Pick up the @item{Pwnhammer} dropped by the Wall of Flesh, equip it, and strike any @item{Demon Altar or Crimson Altar} until the altar breaks.
steps.note: Each altar smashed spawns a new Hardmode ore vein.

achievements.description: Mine a powerful ore that has been newly blessed upon your world.
achievements.summary: Mine a @item{Hardmode ore} newly spread through your world.

guide.context: Smashing altars spawns Cobalt/Palladium, then Mythril/Orichalcum, then Adamantite/Titanium. Mine any of them.

steps.text: Break at least one @item{Demon or Crimson Altar} with the @item{Pwnhammer} so Hardmode ore generates throughout the underground.
Locate @item{Cobalt or Palladium Ore}, equip a @item{Molten Pickaxe or stronger tool}, and mine one ore tile until its item drops.

achievements.description: Equip a pair of wings.
achievements.summary: Equip a pair of @item{wings}.

guide.context: Any wings equipped in a normal accessory slot count. One deterministic Hardmode recipe is Fairy Wings: 20 Souls of Flight from Wyverns plus 99 Pixie Dust from Pixies.

steps.text: Kill @enemy{Wyverns} in @loc{Space} for @item{20 Souls of Flight} and @enemy{Pixies} in the @loc{Hallow} for @item{99 Pixie Dust}.
At a @item{Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil}, craft @item{Fairy Wings}, then place them in a normal accessory slot.

achievements.description: Obtain a boss-summoning item.
achievements.summary: Obtain any @item{boss-summoning item}.

guide.context: The achievement triggers when any boss-summoning item enters your inventory. The Suspicious Looking Eye is an early guaranteed recipe.

steps.text: Kill surface @enemy{Demon Eyes} until you collect @item{6 Lenses}.
Stand beside a @item{Demon or Crimson Altar} and craft a @item{Suspicious Looking Eye} from the @item{6 Lenses}.
steps.note: Crafting the item unlocks Like a Boss; summoning the Eye of Cthulhu is not required.

achievements.description: Defeat the three nocturnal mechanical menaces: the Twins, the Destroyer, and Skeletron Prime.
achievements.summary: Destroy @enemy{The Destroyer} and @enemy{Skeletron Prime}, then finish the mechanical set by beating @enemy{The Twins}.

guide.context: The three kills may be completed on separate nights. Craft their summon items at a Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil and use each only at night; an undefeated mechanical boss leaves at dawn.

steps.text: Craft a @item{Mechanical Eye} from @item{3 Lenses}, @item{5 Iron/Lead Bars}, and @item{6 Souls of Light}; use it at night and defeat @enemy{The Twins}.
Craft a @item{Mechanical Worm} from @item{6 Rotten Chunks or Vertebrae}, @item{5 Iron/Lead Bars}, and @item{6 Souls of Night}; use it at night and defeat @enemy{The Destroyer}.
Craft a @item{Mechanical Skull} from @item{30 Bones}, @item{5 Iron/Lead Bars}, @item{3 Souls of Light}, and @item{3 Souls of Night}; use it at night and defeat @enemy{Skeletron Prime}.

achievements.description: Craft a drax or pickaxe axe using hallowed bars, and the souls of the three mechanical bosses.
achievements.summary: Craft a @item{Drax} or @item{Pickaxe Axe} from Hallowed Bars and mech souls.

guide.context: Crafting—not merely obtaining—the Drax or Pickaxe Axe triggers the achievement. The recipe becomes practical after all three mechanical bosses have supplied their unique Souls.

steps.text: Defeat the mechanical bosses and collect @item{18 Hallowed Bars} plus @item{1 Soul of Might}, @item{1 Soul of Sight}, and @item{1 Soul of Fright}.
At a @item{Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil}, craft either the @item{Drax} or @item{Pickaxe Axe} from those materials.

achievements.description: Mine chlorophyte, an organic ore found deep among the thickest of flora.
achievements.summary: Mine @item{Chlorophyte Ore} deep in the @loc{underground Jungle}.

guide.context: Chlorophyte appears in Mud throughout the Underground Jungle after Hardmode begins. It requires a tool with at least 200% pickaxe power, such as the Drax or Pickaxe Axe.

steps.text: Enter the @loc{Underground Jungle}, locate a glowing green @item{Chlorophyte Ore} vein in Mud, and mine one tile with a @item{Drax or Pickaxe Axe}.

achievements.description: Consume a life fruit, which grows in the thick of subterranean jungle grass.
achievements.summary: Consume a @item{Life Fruit} from the underground Jungle.

guide.context: Life Fruit begin growing on Underground Jungle grass after any mechanical boss is defeated. Your character must first reach 400 maximum health by consuming 15 Life Crystals.

steps.text: Reach @mechanic{400 maximum health}, defeat at least one mechanical boss, then search @loc{Underground Jungle} grass for a small glowing @item{Life Fruit}.
Break the plant with any weapon or tool, pick up the @item{Life Fruit}, and consume it from the inventory or hotbar.
steps.note: Consumption raises maximum health from 400 to 405 and triggers Get a Life.

achievements.description: Defeat Plantera, the overgrown monstrosity of the jungle's depths.
achievements.summary: Defeat @enemy{Plantera} in the underground Jungle.

guide.context: After all three mechanical bosses are defeated, pink Plantera's Bulbs begin growing on grass in the Underground Jungle. Breaking a Bulb summons Plantera immediately at that location.

steps.text: Prepare a fighting area within the @loc{Underground Jungle}, then break a nearby @item{Plantera's Bulb} with a pickaxe or weapon.
Keep @enemy{Plantera} inside the @loc{Underground Jungle} and reduce her health to zero.
steps.note: Leaving the Underground Jungle enrages her; the arena may be open internally as long as it remains in that biome.

achievements.description: Breach the impenetrable walls of the jungle temple.
achievements.summary: Open the @loc{Jungle Temple}'s Lihzahrd Door.

guide.context: Plantera always drops a Temple Key. The key opens the locked Lihzahrd Door at the Jungle Temple's main entrance and is consumed by the unlock.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Plantera} and pick up the guaranteed @item{Temple Key}.
Locate the brown-brick @loc{Jungle Temple}, stand at its entrance, and use the key on the locked @item{Lihzahrd Door}.

achievements.description: Defeat Golem, the stone-faced ritualistic idol of the lihzahrd tribe.
achievements.summary: Defeat @enemy{Golem} in the @loc{Jungle Temple}.

guide.context: The Lihzahrd Altar is in the Jungle Temple's final chamber. Every Lihzahrd Chest contains one Power Cell; Lihzahrds and Flying Snakes can also drop one.

steps.text: Open a @item{Lihzahrd Chest} for its guaranteed @item{Lihzahrd Power Cell}, then carry the cell to the @item{Lihzahrd Altar} in the final chamber.
With the cell in your inventory, use @mechanic{Open / Activate} on the altar to consume one cell and summon @enemy{Golem}.
Defeat the summoned @enemy{Golem}; the achievement triggers when the boss dies.

achievements.description: Obtain a rare treasure from a difficult monster in the dungeon.
achievements.summary: Get a rare weapon drop from post-Plantera @loc{Dungeon} enemies.

guide.context: After Plantera dies, stronger enemy variants spawn in the Dungeon. The achievement requires picking up one of their weapon drops—not merely any rare Dungeon item.

steps.text: Return to the @loc{Dungeon} after defeating @enemy{Plantera} and kill its new post-Plantera enemies.
Keep farming until one drops a qualifying weapon such as @item{Tactical Shotgun}, @item{Sniper Rifle}, @item{Shadowbeam Staff}, @item{Spectre Staff}, @item{Inferno Fork}, or @item{Paladin's Hammer}.
Walk over the dropped weapon so it enters your inventory; that pickup triggers Robbing the Grave.

achievements.description: Unlock one of the dungeon's large, mysterious chests with a special key.
achievements.summary: Unlock a @item{Biome Chest} in the @loc{Dungeon} with a Biome Key.

guide.context: In Hardmode, biome-eligible coin-dropping enemies can award that biome's key at 1/2500 odds (0.04%). Its corresponding Dungeon chest cannot be opened until Plantera has fallen.

steps.text: Choose Jungle, Snow, Hallow, Desert, Corruption, or Crimson and kill coin-dropping enemies there until its @item{Biome Key} drops.
After defeating @enemy{Plantera}, take the key into the @loc{Dungeon} and locate the matching locked chest—for example, a Jungle Key opens the Jungle Chest.
Use the matching key on that @item{Biome Chest}; opening it consumes the key and triggers Big Booty.

achievements.description: Defeat Duke Fishron, mutant terror of the sea.
achievements.summary: Defeat @enemy{Duke Fishron}, terror of the sea.

guide.context: Truffle Worms are rare critters in the Hardmode Underground Glowing Mushroom biome. They flee quickly and must be caught with a Bug Net, then used as fishing bait at either Ocean edge.

steps.text: In Hardmode, catch a @item{Truffle Worm} in an @loc{Underground Glowing Mushroom biome} with a @item{Bug Net}.
Go to the far-left or far-right @loc{Ocean}, equip any fishing pole, place the Truffle Worm in your bait inventory, and cast into the Ocean.
When the line gets a bite, reel it in; the worm is consumed and @enemy{Duke Fishron} spawns immediately. Defeat him to unlock the achievement.

achievements.description: Defeat the Ancient Cultist, fanatical leader of the dungeon coven.
achievements.summary: Defeat the @enemy{Lunatic Cultist} outside the Dungeon.

guide.context: After Golem is defeated, four cultists appear at the Dungeon entrance: two Cultist Archers and two Lunatic Devotees. Killing all four starts the Lunatic Cultist encounter.

steps.text: Return to the @loc{Dungeon entrance} after defeating @enemy{Golem} and kill both @enemy{Cultist Archers} plus both @enemy{Lunatic Devotees}.
Wait for the ritual animation to produce @enemy{Lunatic Cultist}, then reduce the boss's health to zero.

achievements.description: Defeat the four celestial towers of the moon.
achievements.summary: Defeat all four @enemy{Celestial Pillars} of the Lunar Event.

guide.context: Beating the Lunatic Cultist starts the Lunar Event: Solar, Vortex, Nebula and Stardust pillars appear across the world.

steps.text: Travel to the map marker for one pillar and kill its nearby Lunar enemies until the pillar's shield disappears.
Attack the now-vulnerable pillar until it is destroyed, then repeat for @enemy{Solar}, @enemy{Vortex}, @enemy{Nebula}, and @enemy{Stardust}.
Destroy the fourth and final pillar to trigger Star Destroyer.
steps.note: The final destruction also starts the Moon Lord arrival countdown.

achievements.description: Defeat the Moon Lord.
achievements.summary: Defeat the @enemy{Moon Lord}, the final boss.

guide.context: Destroying the fourth Celestial Pillar starts Moon Lord's arrival countdown. During the fight, the eyes in both hands and the forehead must be opened and destroyed before the chest core becomes vulnerable.

steps.text: Destroy all four @enemy{Celestial Pillars}, then remain in the world until the countdown ends and @enemy{Moon Lord} appears.
Damage and destroy the eye in each hand and the eye in Moon Lord's forehead when they open.
After all three eyes are destroyed, attack the exposed @enemy{core in his chest} until the boss dies.

achievements.description: Survive a blood moon, a nocturnal event where the rivers run red and monsters swarm aplenty.
achievements.summary: Survive a @mechanic{Blood Moon}.

guide.context: A Blood Moon is announced at 7:30 PM and ends at 4:30 AM. The achievement requires the character to remain alive through that event night.

steps.text: When the red @mechanic{Blood Moon} announcement appears, avoid dying until the sun rises and normal daytime begins at @mechanic{4:30 AM}.

achievements.description: Defeat King Slime, the lord of all things slimy.
achievements.summary: Defeat @enemy{King Slime}, lord of the slimes.

guide.context: A Slime Crown summons King Slime immediately from any surface location. Craft it at a Demon or Crimson Altar from 20 Gel and a Gold or Platinum Crown.

steps.text: Craft a @item{Gold or Platinum Crown} from @item{5 matching Bars} and @item{1 Ruby} at an @item{Iron or Lead Anvil}.
At a @item{Demon or Crimson Altar}, combine the Crown with @item{20 Gel} to craft a @item{Slime Crown}.
Use the @item{Slime Crown} on the surface, then reduce @enemy{King Slime}'s health to zero.

achievements.description: Triumph over a goblin invasion, a ragtag regiment of crude, barbaric, pointy-eared warriors and their shadowflame sorcerers.
achievements.summary: Defeat a @mechanic{Goblin Army} invasion.

guide.context: A Goblin Battle Standard gives a controlled summon. It requires 10 Tattered Cloth from Goblin Scouts and 5 Wood at a Loom; at least one player in the world needs 200 health to use it.

steps.text: Kill @enemy{Goblin Scouts} near the outer edges of the world for @item{10 Tattered Cloth}, then craft a @item{Goblin Battle Standard} with @item{5 Wood} at a @item{Loom}.
With at least @mechanic{200 maximum health}, use the Standard, return to the central spawn area, and kill invasion enemies until the progress bar reaches 100%.

achievements.description: Triumph over a pirate invasion, a group of pillagers from the sea out for your booty... and your life!
achievements.summary: Defeat a @mechanic{Pirate Invasion}.

guide.context: Once Hardmode starts, a qualifying kill in the Surface Ocean can yield a Pirate Map at 1/100 odds. The item is usable only when at least one player has 200 maximum health.

steps.text: In Hardmode, kill enemies within a surface @loc{Ocean} until one drops a @item{Pirate Map}.
Use the map with at least @mechanic{200 maximum health}, return near world spawn, and kill pirates until the invasion progress reaches 100%.

achievements.description: Survive a solar eclipse, a day darker than night filled with creatures of horror.
achievements.summary: Survive a @mechanic{Solar Eclipse}.

guide.context: The achievement is granted when a Solar Eclipse ends, regardless of kills. A Solar Tablet starts one immediately during Hardmode daytime and the event always ends at 7:30 PM.

steps.text: Find a @item{Solar Tablet} in a Lihzahrd Chest or craft one from @item{8 Solar Tablet Fragments} at a @item{Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil}.
Use the tablet during daytime—using it shortly before @mechanic{7:30 PM} minimizes the wait—then remain alive until the eclipse ends at dusk.

achievements.displayName: Do You Want to Slay a Snowman?
achievements.description: Triumph over the frost legion, a festive family of maniacal snowman mobsters.
achievements.summary: Defeat the @mechanic{Frost Legion} invasion.

guide.context: Summon it with a @item{Snow Globe}, obtained from Presents during the Christmas season.

steps.text: During the Christmas season, open enemy-dropped @item{Presents} until one contains a @item{Snow Globe}.
In Hardmode, use the Snow Globe, return near world spawn, and kill Frost Legion enemies until the invasion progress reaches 100%.

achievements.description: Triumph over a martian invasion, when beings from out of this world come to scramble your brains and probe you in uncomfortable places.
achievements.summary: Defeat a @mechanic{Martian Madness} invasion.

guide.context: After Golem, let a @item{Martian Probe} scan you to trigger the invasion.

steps.text: After defeating @enemy{Golem}, search the @loc{Space layer} in either outer third of the world for a @enemy{Martian Probe}.
Enter its green scan beam and wait for the probe to turn red, then let it fly off-screen; killing it before it escapes prevents the invasion.
Return near world spawn and kill Martian Madness enemies until the invasion progress reaches 100%.

achievements.description: Reach the 15th wave of a pumpkin moon, where evil lurks among the autumn harvest.
achievements.summary: Reach @mechanic{wave 15} of the Pumpkin Moon.

guide.context: A Pumpkin Moon Medallion starts the event only at night. Its recipe is 30 Pumpkins, 5 Ectoplasm, and 10 Hallowed Bars at a Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil.

steps.text: Craft a @item{Pumpkin Moon Medallion} from @item{30 Pumpkins}, @item{5 Ectoplasm}, and @item{10 Hallowed Bars}.
Use it immediately after night begins and kill event enemies quickly enough for the wave indicator to change to @mechanic{Wave 15} before dawn.

achievements.description: Reach the 15th wave of a frost moon, where the festive season quickly degrades into madness.
achievements.summary: Reach @mechanic{wave 15} of the Frost Moon.

guide.context: A Naughty Present starts the Frost Moon only at night. Craft it from 20 Silk, 5 Ectoplasm, and 5 Souls of Fright at a Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil.

steps.text: Craft a @item{Naughty Present} from @item{20 Silk}, @item{5 Ectoplasm}, and @item{5 Souls of Fright}.
Use it at the start of night and kill event enemies quickly enough for the wave indicator to change to @mechanic{Wave 15} before dawn.

achievements.description: Survive the slime rain, where gelatinous organisms fall from the sky in droves.
achievements.summary: Survive a @mechanic{Slime Rain}.

guide.context: Slime Rain begins with a status message and continues until its timer or slime-kill condition ends it. Dying before the event finishes does not count as surviving it.

steps.text: After @mechanic{Slime Rain} begins, remain alive until the `Slime has stopped falling from the sky!` end message appears.

achievements.description: Have all possible town NPCs living in your world.
achievements.summary: House @mechanic{all 25 town NPCs} at once.

guide.context: Keep at least 25 valid houses available and unlock every counted resident in one world. Traveling Merchant, Old Man, Skeleton Merchant, Santa Claus, town pets, and Town Slimes are excluded; all 25 entries below must be alive and housed together.

collectibles.name: Guide
collectibles.method: Present automatically in a normal new world; assign him a valid house.

collectibles.name: Merchant
collectibles.method: Carry more than @item{50 silver} across all players' inventories and leave a valid house open.

collectibles.name: Nurse
collectibles.method: Raise one player's maximum health above 100 and have the Merchant present.

collectibles.name: Demolitionist
collectibles.method: Keep a Bomb, Grenade, Dynamite, or another explosive in a player's inventory while the Merchant is present.

collectibles.name: Dye Trader
collectibles.method: Have at least four other town NPCs, then keep a Strange Plant, Dye Vat, finished dye, or dye-producing plant in a player's inventory.

collectibles.name: Angler
collectibles.method: Find the @npc{Sleeping Angler} and use @mechanic{Open / Activate} on him, then provide housing.

collectibles.name: Zoologist
collectibles.method: Unlock @mechanic{10% of the Bestiary} (55 entries).

collectibles.name: Dryad
collectibles.method: Defeat Eye of Cthulhu, an evil-biome boss, or Skeletron.

collectibles.name: Painter
collectibles.method: Have eight other town NPCs alive in the world.

collectibles.name: Golfer
collectibles.method: Find the bound Golfer and use @mechanic{Open / Activate} to rescue him.

collectibles.name: Arms Dealer
collectibles.method: Keep bullets or a gun that fires bullets in a player's inventory.

collectibles.name: Tavernkeep
collectibles.location: Random world location after an evil boss
collectibles.method: Kill either evil boss—Eater of Worlds in Corruption or Brain of Cthulhu in Crimson—then locate the @npc{Unconscious Man} and use @mechanic{Open / Activate} on him.

collectibles.name: Stylist
collectibles.method: Find the Webbed Stylist and use @mechanic{Open / Activate} to free her.

collectibles.name: Goblin Tinkerer
collectibles.method: Defeat a Goblin Army, find the Bound Goblin underground, and use @mechanic{Open / Activate} on him.

collectibles.name: Witch Doctor
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Queen Bee}.

collectibles.name: Clothier
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Skeletron}; the Old Man becomes the Clothier.

collectibles.name: Mechanic
collectibles.method: Find the Bound Mechanic after Skeletron and use @mechanic{Open / Activate} to rescue her.

collectibles.name: Party Girl
collectibles.method: Keep 20 other town NPCs housed; each eligible morning she has a 1/40 chance to move in.

collectibles.name: Wizard
collectibles.method: Find the Bound Wizard and use @mechanic{Open / Activate} to rescue him.

collectibles.name: Tax Collector
collectibles.method: Find a @enemy{Tortured Soul} and use @item{Purification Powder} on it instead of killing it.

collectibles.name: Truffle
collectibles.method: In Hardmode, build and leave vacant a valid house inside a Surface Glowing Mushroom biome.

collectibles.name: Pirate
collectibles.method: Defeat a @mechanic{Pirate Invasion}.

collectibles.name: Steampunker
collectibles.method: Defeat any one mechanical boss.

collectibles.name: Cyborg
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Plantera}.

collectibles.name: Princess
collectibles.method: Have every other counted town NPC above alive and housed; Santa Claus and town pets are not prerequisites.

achievements.description: Fire a Bee Gun while wearing a full set of Bee Armor.
achievements.summary: Shoot a @item{Bee Gun} with a complete @item{Bee Armor} set equipped.

guide.context: The @item{Bee Gun} is a Queen Bee drop. The armor is crafted at an Iron/Lead Anvil from 30 total @item{Bee Wax}: 8 for the headgear, 12 for the breastplate, and 10 for the greaves.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Queen Bee} until she drops the @item{Bee Gun} and you have at least @item{30 Bee Wax}.
Use an @item{Iron or Lead Anvil} to make the three Bee pieces: @item{Bee Greaves} (10 Wax), @item{Bee Headgear} (8), and @item{Bee Breastplate} (12); wear the complete set.
With the full Bee Armor set still equipped, use the @item{Bee Gun} once to fire it.

achievements.description: Stumble into a spider cavern in the underground.
achievements.summary: Stumble into an underground @loc{Spider Nest}.

guide.context: Spider Nests are dark, web-filled caverns found in the cavern layer.

steps.text: Explore caves until you enter a @loc{Spider Nest}.

achievements.description: Build or encounter a glowing mushroom field above the surface.
achievements.summary: Reach or grow a @loc{surface Glowing Mushroom biome}.

guide.context: Normal worlds do not generate a surface Glowing Mushroom biome. Build one above 0 depth by spreading Mushroom Grass across Mud until at least 200 mushroom-related tiles are near the character.

steps.text: Place a wide field of @item{Mud Blocks} above surface level, plant @item{Mushroom Grass Seeds}, and let the grass spread.
Stand in the field after it reaches at least @mechanic{200 mushroom-related tiles}; the glowing background/music confirms the biome and triggers Funkytown.

achievements.description: You can only go down from here!
achievements.summary: Fly or climb up to the @loc{Space} layer.

guide.context: Space is the topmost layer, above the surface clouds.

steps.text: Ascend to @loc{Space} using wings, a mount, or tall towers.

achievements.description: The only way is up!
achievements.summary: Reach the very bottom edge of the @loc{Underworld}.

guide.context: Keep going down past the lava lakes until the message says you can only go up.

steps.text: Travel to the lowest point of the @loc{Underworld}.

achievements.description: Do battle against the Twins, the Destroyer, and Skeletron Prime simultaneously and emerge victorious.
achievements.summary: Beat @enemy{all three mechanical bosses at once}.

guide.context: All three mechanical bosses must be alive in the world at the same time, and all three must then die. Prepare the three summon items and a full night before beginning.

steps.text: At the start of night, use a @item{Mechanical Eye}, @item{Mechanical Worm}, and @item{Mechanical Skull} one after another before killing any summoned boss.
Once the three health-bar groups coexist, kill @enemy{The Destroyer}, @enemy{Skeletron Prime}, and both eyes of @enemy{The Twins} before dawn.
steps.note: A large arena, strong gear and mobility are essential.

achievements.description: Defeat every type of slime there is!
achievements.summary: Kill one of each of the game's @mechanic{26 slime types}.

guide.context: Most slimes die naturally as you play; the missable ones are the Hardmode and evil-biome variants. Both a Corruption and a Crimson world are needed for the Crimslimes.

collectibles.name: Green Slime
collectibles.method: Common everywhere

collectibles.name: Blue Slime
collectibles.method: Common in caves

collectibles.name: Red Slime
collectibles.method: Common in caves

collectibles.name: Purple Slime
collectibles.method: Common in caves

collectibles.name: Yellow Slime
collectibles.method: Common in caves

collectibles.name: Black Slime
collectibles.method: Common in caves

collectibles.name: Baby Slime
collectibles.method: Cavern layer

collectibles.name: Mother Slime
collectibles.method: Splits into Baby Slimes when hit

collectibles.name: Jungle Slime
collectibles.method: Common in the Jungle

collectibles.name: Spiked Jungle Slime
collectibles.method: Fires spikes; underground Jungle

collectibles.name: Ice Slime
collectibles.method: Common in the Snow biome

collectibles.name: Spiked Ice Slime
collectibles.method: Hardmode underground Snow

collectibles.name: Lava Slime
collectibles.method: Common in the Underworld

collectibles.name: Toxic Sludge
collectibles.method: Hardmode caverns

collectibles.name: Dungeon Slime
collectibles.method: Spawns in the Dungeon

collectibles.name: Corrupt Slime
collectibles.method: Corruption biome

collectibles.name: Slimer
collectibles.method: Flying Corruption slime; drops Slimeling

collectibles.name: Slimeling
collectibles.method: Spawned by a defeated Slimer

collectibles.name: Crimslime
collectibles.method: Hardmode Crimson

collectibles.name: Little Crimslime
collectibles.method: Split from a Big Crimslime

collectibles.name: Big Crimslime
collectibles.method: Hardmode Crimson; splits into smaller ones

collectibles.name: Illuminant Slime
collectibles.method: Hardmode Hallow underground

collectibles.name: Rainbow Slime
collectibles.method: Rare Hardmode Hallow spawn

collectibles.name: Umbrella Slime
collectibles.method: Spawns during rain

collectibles.name: Pinky
collectibles.method: Rare pink slime

collectibles.name: King Slime
collectibles.method: Summon with a @item{Slime Crown}

achievements.description: Equip armor or vanity clothing in all three social slots.
achievements.summary: Equip items in all three @mechanic{social/vanity slots}.

guide.context: The vanity slots sit beside your armor slots and only change appearance. Any three wearables fill them.

steps.text: Put one wearable into each social position beside your helmet, torso armor, and leg armor.

achievements.description: Defeat an enemy by running it over with a minecart.
achievements.summary: Run over an enemy with a @item{minecart}.

guide.context: The enemy must die from direct minecart collision damage. A laser from the @item{Minecart Upgrade Kit} does not count.

steps.text: Lay a long, level @item{Minecart Track}, weaken a ground enemy, and position it on the rail.
Enter a @item{minecart}, accelerate along the track, and strike the enemy with the cart itself for the killing blow.

achievements.description: Destroy a total of 10,000 tiles.
achievements.summary: Destroy @mechanic{10,000 tiles} total.

guide.context: The counter increases only when a pickaxe-like tool removes a solid tile, object, or furniture item. Hammers, explosives, and block destruction caused by other effects do not count; a multi-tile object adds only one.

steps.text: Use a @item{pickaxe}, @item{drill}, @item{Gravedigger's Shovel}, or @item{Drill Mount} to mine blocks and placed objects until the cumulative counter reaches @mechanic{10,000}.

achievements.displayName: There are Some Who Call Him...
achievements.description: Kill Tim.
achievements.summary: Kill @enemy{Tim}, a rare underground mage.

guide.context: Tim is a rare caster found from the midpoint of the @loc{Cavern layer} downward. A @item{Lifeform Analyzer} identifies him; equipping any @item{Gem Robe} while leaving off the @item{Wizard Hat} sharply improves his spawn rate.

steps.text: Equip a @item{Gem Robe} but no @item{Wizard Hat}, then patrol the lower @loc{Cavern layer} or deeper until @enemy{Tim} appears on the @item{Lifeform Analyzer}.
Locate the teleporting robed caster and kill @enemy{Tim}; the achievement triggers on his first defeat.

achievements.description: Kill a nymph.
achievements.summary: Kill a @enemy{Nymph}.

guide.context: A Nymph initially appears as the passive @enemy{Lost Girl} in the Cavern layer. It must transform before it is killed; killing the disguise before the change does not count.

steps.text: Search the @loc{Cavern layer} for a motionless @enemy{Lost Girl}; approach until she stands, transforms, and the name changes to @enemy{Nymph}.
Kill her after the transformation to unlock the achievement.

achievements.description: Obtain a Terra Blade, forged from the finest blades of light and darkness.
achievements.summary: Obtain the @item{Terra Blade}, forged from light and dark blades.

guide.context: The current Terra Blade recipe uses one True Night's Edge, one True Excalibur, and one Broken Hero Sword at a Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil.

steps.text: Craft @item{Night's Edge} from Muramasa, Volcano, Blade of Grass, and Light's Bane or Blood Butcherer at a @item{Demon or Crimson Altar}.
At a @item{Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil}, combine Night's Edge with @item{20 each Souls of Might, Sight, and Fright} to make @item{True Night's Edge}.
Craft @item{Excalibur} from @item{12 Hallowed Bars}, then combine it with @item{24 Chlorophyte Bars} to make @item{True Excalibur}.
During a post-Plantera @mechanic{Solar Eclipse}, kill @enemy{Mothron} until it drops a @item{Broken Hero Sword}.
At a @item{Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil}, merge the two True blades and one @item{Broken Hero Sword}; take the resulting @item{Terra Blade}.

achievements.description: Survive a long fall with just a sliver of health remaining.
achievements.summary: Survive a long fall with under @mechanic{10% health} remaining.

guide.context: Land from a damaging fall with less than 10% of maximum health. Wings, Lucky Horseshoe effects, grapples, mounts, and other fall-damage protection invalidate the setup; the @mechanic{Stoned} debuff also cannot earn it.

steps.text: Remove all fall-damage protection and defense bonuses, heal to full, and build a measured vertical drop onto a solid platform.
For a deterministic setup, use @mechanic{500 max health}, @mechanic{0 defense}, and a drop of exactly @mechanic{74 tiles}; landing with 10 HP unlocks the achievement.

achievements.description: Throw a yoyo.
achievements.summary: Throw a @item{yoyo}.

guide.context: Any yoyo counts. The deterministic early option is a Wooden Yoyo crafted at a Work Bench.

steps.text: Collect @item{10 Wood} and @item{20 Cobweb}, then craft a @item{Wooden Yoyo} beside a @item{Work Bench}.
Place the yoyo on the hotbar, select it, and hold the use button to throw it once.

achievements.description: Equip a dye in every possible dye slot.
achievements.summary: Fill every @mechanic{dye slot} — all 13.

guide.context: Thirteen functional positions need dye: three for armor, five for accessories, plus five in the equipment panel. The latter correspond to hook, mount, minecart, light pet, and pet; vanity armor is excluded.

steps.text: After the @npc{Dye Trader} moves in, buy @item{13 Silver Dye} from his shop for @item{1 gold each}; identical dyes may fill every slot. As a crafted alternative, buy his @item{Dye Vat} and convert collected dye plants into dyes.
Place one dye beside each of the @mechanic{3 armor slots}, then one beside every equipped accessory so all @mechanic{5 accessory dye slots} are occupied.
In the equipment panel, add dyes next to the @mechanic{grappling hook} and @mechanic{mount}, then do the same for the @mechanic{minecart}, @mechanic{light pet}, and @mechanic{pet}.

achievements.description: Obtain the Terrarian.
achievements.summary: Obtain the @item{Terrarian}, the ultimate yoyo.

guide.context: The Terrarian is a @enemy{Moon Lord} drop.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Moon Lord} repeatedly until the @item{Terrarian} yoyo drops, then pick it up so it enters your inventory.

achievements.description: Spend over 1 gold being treated by the nurse.
achievements.summary: Pay the @npc{Nurse} over @item{1 gold} in total healing.

guide.context: The cost is cumulative across Nurse visits. Healing larger health deficits and removing debuffs raises the bill.

steps.text: Move the @npc{Nurse} beside a safe damage source, take damage without dying, talk to her, select @mechanic{Heal}, and repeat until your cumulative payments exceed @item{1 gold}.

achievements.description: Equip a mount.
achievements.summary: Equip any @item{mount}.

guide.context: Any mount works. The Fuzzy Carrot is a guaranteed early example awarded by the Angler after the character completes five fishing quests.

steps.text: Complete @mechanic{5 Angler fishing quests} to receive the @item{Fuzzy Carrot}.
Open the equipment screen and place the @item{Fuzzy Carrot} in the dedicated @mechanic{mount slot}.
steps.note: Equipping the mount item satisfies the achievement; using the mount afterward is optional.

achievements.description: Obtain a minishark.
achievements.summary: Obtain a @item{Minishark} from the @npc{Arms Dealer}.

guide.context: The Arms Dealer sells the Minishark for @item{35 gold} once he has moved in.

steps.text: Save @item{35 gold} and buy the @item{Minishark} from the @npc{Arms Dealer}.

achievements.description: Kill the groom.
achievements.summary: Kill @enemy{The Groom}.

guide.context: The Groom is a rare zombie variant that spawns on the surface only during a @mechanic{Blood Moon} (7:30 PM-4:30 AM).

steps.text: Wait for a @mechanic{Blood Moon}, then patrol a flat @loc{Surface} area while ordinary Blood Moon enemies can spawn.
Identify the top-hat-wearing zombie named @enemy{The Groom} and kill him before dawn.

achievements.description: Kill Doctor Bones.
achievements.summary: Kill @enemy{Doctor Bones}.

guide.context: Doctor Bones is a rare zombie variant that spawns at night on @loc{Jungle grass}, on either the surface or underground. Searching before Hardmode keeps the Jungle spawn pool less crowded.

steps.text: At night, patrol a long strip of natural @loc{Jungle grass}; use a @item{Water Candle} and @item{Battle Potion} if available to increase enemy spawns.
Find the fedora-wearing zombie named @enemy{Doctor Bones} and kill him before dawn.

achievements.description: Kill pinky.
achievements.summary: Kill @enemy{Pinky}.

guide.context: Pinky is a rare, fast pink slime that can spawn anywhere slimes do.

steps.text: Find and defeat @enemy{Pinky}.

achievements.description: Fire a rainbow gun while riding on a unicorn.
achievements.summary: Fire a @item{Rainbow Gun} while riding the @item{Unicorn Mount}.

guide.context: The @item{Rainbow Gun} is guaranteed inside the Dungeon's @item{Hallowed Chest}, which can be opened with a @item{Hallowed Key} only after Plantera is defeated. A @item{Blessed Apple}, dropped specifically by Unicorns at 1/40 odds (2.5%), summons the Unicorn Mount.

steps.text: In Hardmode, farm enemies in the @loc{Hallow} for a @item{Hallowed Key}; after defeating @enemy{Plantera}, use it on the @item{Hallowed Chest} in the Dungeon and take the @item{Rainbow Gun}.
On the Hardmode Surface Hallow, kill @enemy{Unicorns} until one drops a @item{Blessed Apple}; equip or use the apple to summon the @item{Unicorn Mount}.
While still riding the Unicorn, select and fire the @item{Rainbow Gun}.

achievements.description: Command nine summoned minions simultaneously.
achievements.summary: Command @mechanic{nine minions} at once.

guide.context: You need nine active minion slots, not nine projectiles from one unusual summon. Endgame summoner armor, slot accessories, a @item{Summoning Potion}, and a @item{Bewitching Table} buff can supply the capacity.

steps.text: Equip enough @item{summoner armor} and @item{minion-slot accessories} to reach at least seven slots, then use a @item{Summoning Potion} and interact with a @item{Bewitching Table} for two more.
Repeatedly use a summon weapon until the minion counter reaches @mechanic{9 active minions} at once.

achievements.description: Obtain a rainbow rod.
achievements.summary: Obtain the @item{Rainbow Rod}.

guide.context: Every ingredient comes from Hardmode Hallow progression, capped by The Twins. Rainbow Rod is crafted at a Mythril/Orichalcum Anvil; it is not a Hallowed Mimic drop.

steps.text: Mine @item{10 Crystal Shards} growing on blocks in the @loc{Underground Hallow}, and kill Underground Hallow enemies until @item{8 Souls of Light} drop.
On the @loc{Surface Hallow}, kill @enemy{Pixies} for @item{10 Pixie Dust} and @enemy{Unicorns} for @item{2 Unicorn Horns}.
Defeat @enemy{The Twins} and keep @item{15 Souls of Sight} from the boss reward.
At a @item{Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil}, combine those materials to craft the @item{Rainbow Rod}.

achievements.description: Build a house in a mushroom biome and have the Truffle move in.
achievements.summary: Get the @npc{Truffle} to move into a surface Glowing Mushroom house.

guide.context: The Truffle can move in only during Hardmode, and the house itself must be above 0 depth inside a valid surface Glowing Mushroom biome.

steps.text: Above surface level, spread @item{Mushroom Grass} across Mud until at least @mechanic{100 mushroom-related tiles} create a Glowing Mushroom biome.
Build valid housing within that biome and confirm it with the @mechanic{Housing Query} tool.
Leave the suitable house vacant during @mechanic{Hardmode} and wait for the @npc{Truffle} to move in; his arrival triggers the achievement.

achievements.description: Become a victim to a nasty underground trap.
achievements.summary: Die to a @mechanic{trap}.

guide.context: The killing blow must come from a trap. A natural @mechanic{Dart Trap}, @mechanic{Boulder}, or wired explosive is easy to reuse after reducing your health first.

steps.text: Find a wired @mechanic{trap} underground, clear nearby enemies, and lower your health until the trap's next hit will be lethal.
Trigger the pressure plate and let the trap itself deliver the killing blow.

achievements.description: Travel a total of 26.2 miles on foot.
achievements.summary: Cover a cumulative @mechanic{26.2 miles} - that's 69,168 tiles - using only your feet.

guide.context: Accumulate 69,168 tiles of horizontal movement on foot. Mount travel, flight, minecarts, grapples, and being pulled by the Wall of Flesh's Tongue do not count.

steps.text: Remove your mount, run back and forth along a long flat bridge, and keep your character on the ground until cumulative on-foot travel reaches @mechanic{69,168 tiles}.

achievements.description: Obtain a golden fishing rod.
achievements.summary: Receive the Angler's top-tier pole, the @item{Golden Fishing Rod}.

guide.context: The Angler awards the @item{Golden Fishing Rod} after exactly 30 completed quests. If that guaranteed reward is missed, it can also appear as a 1/250 reward after 75 quests.

steps.text: Complete and turn in the daily quest fish until your cumulative count reaches @mechanic{30}; accept the @item{Golden Fishing Rod} from the 30th reward.

achievements.description: Complete your 1st quest for the angler.
achievements.summary: Complete your @mechanic{1st Angler quest}.

guide.context: Wake the Sleeping Angler at either Ocean, give him a valid house, then complete his current daily request before it changes at 4:30 AM.

steps.text: Use @mechanic{Open / Activate} on the @npc{Sleeping Angler} at an @loc{Ocean}, then talk to him and select @mechanic{Quest}; note the named fish and the biome/layer in his clue.
Fish in the requested location until that exact @item{quest fish} enters your inventory, return before the next 4:30 AM, and hand it to the Angler.

achievements.description: Complete your 10th quest for the angler.
achievements.summary: Complete @mechanic{10 Angler quests}.

guide.context: The Angler assigns one fish per in-game day. Select @mechanic{Quest}, catch the named quest fish in the stated biome/layer, and return it before the request resets at 4:30 AM.

steps.text: Repeat the full request-catch-turn-in cycle on 10 different in-game days; the cumulative 10th hand-in unlocks the achievement.

achievements.description: Complete your 25th quest for the angler.
achievements.summary: Complete @mechanic{25 Angler quests}.

guide.context: Quest totals are cumulative across characters and worlds. Only one hand-in per character is accepted for each in-game day.

steps.text: Each day, select @mechanic{Quest}, catch the named fish in its required biome/layer, and return it before 4:30 AM; complete the 25th cumulative hand-in.

achievements.description: Complete your 50th quest for the angler.
achievements.summary: Complete @mechanic{50 Angler quests}.

guide.context: Continue the same daily Angler loop; sleeping in a bed accelerates time between completed requests but does not create a second quest on the same day.

steps.text: Turn in the specifically requested quest fish on 50 separate quest days; the 50th cumulative hand-in unlocks the achievement.

achievements.description: Complete a grand total of 200 quests for the angler.
achievements.summary: Complete @mechanic{200 Angler quests}.

guide.context: This is 200 completed daily hand-ins, cumulative across characters and worlds. The requested fish changes at 4:30 AM; a bed accelerates the wait after each completed quest.

steps.text: For each quest day, ask the @npc{Angler} for the fish, catch it in the clue's biome/layer, and hand it in before the next 4:30 AM; repeat until the cumulative counter reaches @mechanic{200}.
steps.note: Store duplicate quest fish outside your inventory before catching another; keeping biome fishing pools and pylons ready shortens later requests.

achievements.description: Attain maximum health and mana possible without accessories or buffs.
achievements.summary: Max out to @item{500 health} and @item{200 mana}, with accessories and buffs not counting.

guide.context: The achievement checks permanent base stats: 500 health and 200 mana. Temporary Lifeforce, armor, and accessory bonuses do not substitute for consumed permanent boosters.

steps.text: Consume exactly @item{15 Life Crystals} to raise base health from 100 to 400.
After at least one mechanical boss, consume @item{20 Life Fruit} to raise base health from 400 to 500.
Craft and consume @item{9 Mana Crystals}—45 Fallen Stars total—to raise base mana from 20 to 200.
Remove temporary stat-boosting equipment/buffs if necessary; the achievement triggers once the character has permanent @mechanic{500 health and 200 mana}.

achievements.description: Defeat every boss in Terraria.
achievements.summary: Defeat every mandatory boss in Terraria — 15 in all.

guide.context: This ticks off as you clear the campaign, but you must beat BOTH evil bosses (needing a Corruption and a Crimson world). Event and later-added bosses are not required.

collectibles.name: Eye of Cthulhu
collectibles.method: Summon with a @item{Suspicious Looking Eye}

collectibles.name: Eater of Worlds
collectibles.method: Break 3 Shadow Orbs or use @item{Worm Food}

collectibles.name: Brain of Cthulhu
collectibles.method: Break 3 Crimson Hearts or use a @item{Bloody Spine}
collectibles.note: Crimson worlds only — needed alongside a Corruption world.

collectibles.name: Queen Bee
collectibles.method: Break a hive @item{Larva} or use @item{Abeemination}

collectibles.name: Skeletron
collectibles.method: At night, talk to the @npc{Old Man} and select @mechanic{Curse}

collectibles.name: Wall of Flesh
collectibles.method: Drop a @item{Guide Voodoo Doll} in lava

collectibles.name: The Twins
collectibles.method: Use a @item{Mechanical Eye}

collectibles.name: The Destroyer
collectibles.method: Use a @item{Mechanical Worm}

collectibles.name: Skeletron Prime
collectibles.method: Use a @item{Mechanical Skull}

collectibles.name: Plantera
collectibles.method: Break a @item{Plantera's Bulb} after the mech bosses

collectibles.name: Golem
collectibles.method: Use a @item{Lihzahrd Power Cell} at the altar

collectibles.name: Duke Fishron
collectibles.method: Fish with a @item{Truffle Worm}

collectibles.name: Lunatic Cultist
collectibles.method: Kill the gathered @enemy{cultists} after Golem

collectibles.name: Celestial Pillars
collectibles.method: Destroy all four @enemy{Lunar Pillars}

collectibles.name: Moon Lord
collectibles.method: Clear the four pillars (or use a @item{Celestial Sigil})

achievements.description: Survive your character's first full night.
achievements.summary: Live through your @mechanic{first full night} without dying.

guide.context: Enemies get bolder after dusk on night one. Stay near shelter and you will make it to dawn.

steps.text: Survive from dusk to dawn on your @mechanic{first night}.
steps.note: Fighting from inside an enclosed room makes it trivial.

achievements.description: Equip armor in all three armor slots: head, chest, and feet.
achievements.summary: Wear one matching set across the @item{head}, @item{chest}, and @item{leg} armor positions.

guide.context: Use one named three-piece set so the pieces cannot be mismatched. The earliest guaranteed option is full Wood Armor, which costs 75 Wood total at a Work Bench.

steps.text: At a @item{Work Bench}, spend @item{20 Wood} on a @item{Wood Helmet}, @item{30 Wood} on a @item{Wood Breastplate}, and @item{25 Wood} on @item{Wood Greaves}.
Equip those three Wood pieces in the head, torso, and leg armor slots at the same time.

achievements.description: Craft your first work bench.
achievements.summary: Craft your first @item{Work Bench}.

guide.context: The Work Bench is the gateway crafting station, made from 10 wood by hand.

steps.text: Craft a @item{Work Bench} from @item{10 wood} in your inventory crafting menu.

achievements.description: Defeat the Empress of Light, responsible for all those flashy lights and glitter.
achievements.summary: Defeat the @enemy{Empress of Light}.

guide.context: After Plantera, Prismatic Lacewings spawn on Hallowed surface blocks between 7:30 PM and midnight. A player-caused Lacewing death summons Empress of Light.

steps.text: Between @mechanic{7:30 PM and midnight}, search the @loc{surface Hallow} for a glowing @enemy{Prismatic Lacewing} and catch it with a @item{Bug Net}.
Release the captured Lacewing in the Hallow and kill it yourself to summon @enemy{Empress of Light}, then defeat the boss.

achievements.description: Defeat Queen Slime, giving the coup-de-grace to the sovereign of all that jiggles.
achievements.summary: Defeat @enemy{Queen Slime} in the Hallow.

guide.context: A Gelatin Crystal is a rare glowing growth among Crystal Shards in the Underground Hallow. It can summon Queen Slime at any time in either surface or Underground Hallow.

steps.text: Search Pearlstone/Pink Ice in the @loc{Underground Hallow} for a pink-blue pulsing @item{Gelatin Crystal}, then break and collect it.
While standing anywhere in @loc{The Hallow}, use the Gelatin Crystal and defeat the summoned @enemy{Queen Slime}.

achievements.description: Defeat the Dreadnautilus, murderous mollusk lurking beneath the surface of the sanguine seas.
achievements.summary: Defeat the @enemy{Dreadnautilus} during a Blood Moon.

guide.context: During a Blood Moon, reeling a fishing bite can replace the catch with one of five enemies; Dreadnautilus is 10% of those enemy spawn attempts and escapes at dawn.

steps.text: During a @mechanic{Blood Moon}, fish in any sufficiently large pool and reel in bites until @enemy{Dreadnautilus} emerges from the bobber.
Reduce @enemy{Dreadnautilus}'s health to zero before @mechanic{4:30 AM}; it flies away at dawn.

achievements.description: Repel the strongest forces the Old One's Army can muster.
achievements.summary: Repel the strongest tier of the @mechanic{Old One's Army}.

guide.context: Defeating Golem upgrades the next Old One's Army to Tier 3. The event needs an Eternia Crystal Stand centered on a flat 121-tile-wide floor with at least 10 tiles of vertical clearance.

steps.text: After defeating @enemy{Golem}, buy an @item{Eternia Crystal Stand} and @item{Eternia Crystal} from the @npc{Tavernkeep}.
Place the Stand at the center of a flat floor extending at least @mechanic{60 tiles left and 60 right}, with 10 clear tiles overhead, then place the Crystal on it.
Protect the Crystal through all seven waves and defeat @enemy{Betsy} in wave 7; the tier ends only when Betsy dies.

achievements.description: Obtain the Zenith, the culmination of a journey forged into the ultimate sword.
achievements.summary: Obtain the @item{Zenith}, the ultimate sword.

guide.context: Zenith has a fixed ten-sword recipe. The final two components, Meowmere and Star Wrath, are Moon Lord drops; all ten swords are consumed by crafting.

steps.text: At an @item{Iron or Lead Anvil}, craft a @item{Copper Shortsword} from @item{5 Copper Bars}; loot @item{Starfury} from a Floating Island’s Skyware Chest/Sky Crate, and obtain @item{Enchanted Sword} from an Enchanted Sword Shrine or Gold/Titanium Crate.

Defeat @enemy{Queen Bee} for @item{Bee Keeper}. For @item{Terra Blade}, follow the Sword of the Hero guide: craft Night’s Edge and Excalibur, upgrade both to their True versions, then combine those with a Broken Hero Sword at a Mythril/Orichalcum Anvil.

Defeat @enemy{Plantera} until @item{Seedler} drops. During Pumpkin Moon, defeat @enemy{Pumpking} for @item{The Horseman’s Blade}; during Martian Madness, defeat @enemy{Martian Saucers} for @item{Influx Waver}.
Defeat @enemy{Moon Lord} repeatedly until both @item{Star Wrath} and @item{Meowmere} have dropped.
Bring all ten swords to a @item{Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil} and craft @item{Zenith}.

achievements.description: Obtain the Terraspark Boots, forged from the finest boots of fire and ice.
achievements.summary: Craft the @item{Terraspark Boots}.

guide.context: Terraspark Boots are the final Tinkerer's Workshop combination of Frostspark Boots and Lava Waders. Both branches can be completed before any boss, but they require several chest and enemy drops.

steps.text: Buy @item{Rocket Boots} from the @npc{Goblin Tinkerer}, and find @item{Hermes Boots} in an Underground Gold Chest; combine them into @item{Spectre Boots} at a @item{Tinkerer's Workshop}.
Find an @item{Aglet} in Surface Wooden Chests/Wooden Crates, an @item{Anklet of the Wind} in Jungle Ivy Chests/Jungle Crates, and @item{Ice Skates} in Frozen Chests/Frozen or Boreal Crates.
At the Workshop, add Aglet + Anklet to Spectre Boots for @item{Lightning Boots}, then add Ice Skates for @item{Frostspark Boots}.

Find @item{Water Walking Boots} in Water Chests/Ocean Crates, obtain a @item{Lava Charm} from lava-layer Cavern chests or Obsidian/Hellstone Crates, and farm @enemy{Fire Imps} for an @item{Obsidian Rose}.

At a @item{Furnace}, craft @item{2 Obsidian Skulls} from @item{40 Obsidian}. At the Workshop, pair one with Water Walking Boots and the other with Lava Charm to make @item{Obsidian Water Walking Boots} and @item{Molten Charm}.
At the Workshop, combine @item{Obsidian Water Walking Boots}, @item{Molten Charm}, and @item{Obsidian Rose} into @item{Lava Waders}.
At the @item{Tinkerer's Workshop}, combine @item{Frostspark Boots} with @item{Lava Waders} to craft @item{Terraspark Boots}.

achievements.description: Fly a kite on a windy day.
achievements.summary: Send a @item{kite} into the air while the wind is howling on a @mechanic{Windy Day}.

guide.context: A Windy Day occurs when wind speed exceeds 20 mph; swaying trees, blowing leaves, and the background wind indicate it. Kites are commonly dropped by Windy Balloon enemies during this weather.

steps.text: During a @mechanic{Windy Day}, kill @enemy{Windy Balloons} until one drops a @item{kite}, or use any kite already obtained.
Stand outdoors with clear sky above you, select the kite, and hold @mechanic{Use / Attack} until it is visibly flying.

achievements.description: Enter a misty graveyard filled with the surly dead.
achievements.summary: Create and enter a @loc{Graveyard} biome.

guide.context: The Graveyard effect begins at five nearby Tombstones, but the achievement completes at seven. Nearby Sunflowers each cancel one Tombstone for biome calculations.

steps.text: Remove nearby @item{Sunflowers}, place @item{7 Tombstones} within roughly a single-screen area, and stand among them until the Graveyard fog/background fully appears.

achievements.description: Drop a lure in a pool of lava for a pre-fried haul!
achievements.summary: Catch something while @mechanic{fishing in lava}.

guide.context: A normal pole works with bait caught in the Underworld. Other valid setups use the @item{Hotline Fishing Hook}, an accessory upgraded from the @item{Lavaproof Fishing Hook}, or that hook itself.

steps.text: Catch an @item{Underworld bait} critter (such as a Lavafly, Magma Snail, or Hell Butterfly) with a @item{Lavaproof Bug Net}, or equip lava-capable fishing gear.
Cast any fishing pole into a sufficiently large @loc{lava pool}; wait for a bite, reel it in, and successfully obtain any lava catch.

achievements.description: Trick a gnome into turning into stone!
achievements.summary: Trick a @enemy{Gnome} into turning to @item{stone}.

guide.context: Gnomes are enemies and cannot be caught. They commonly emerge from the hollow interior of a natural @loc{Living Tree} and turn into a @item{Garden Gnome} when exposed to direct surface sunlight.

steps.text: Find a natural @loc{Living Tree} with an underground room, then open a clear tunnel from that room to the surface so sunlight reaches the route.
When a @enemy{Gnome} spawns inside, do not attack it; stand where it can see you and lure it up the tunnel into direct @mechanic{daylight}.
Keep it in sunlight until it instantly petrifies into a placed @item{Garden Gnome}.

achievements.description: Meet with a tenant who's as happy as they possibly can be!
achievements.summary: Meet a @npc{town NPC} at maximum happiness.

guide.context: Use a known maximum-happiness arrangement rather than guessing: house the Arms Dealer and Nurse together in the Desert, with no other NPCs crowding them, then speak to the Arms Dealer.

steps.text: Build two valid houses in the @loc{Desert}, close enough that the occupants count as neighbors, and move the @npc{Arms Dealer} and @npc{Nurse} into them.
Move other town NPCs away from this pair, wait for both to occupy their assigned houses, then use @mechanic{Open / Activate} on the @npc{Arms Dealer} and enter his dialogue.

achievements.description: Deliver headpats to the town pet.
achievements.summary: Give the @npc{town pet} some headpats.

guide.context: The Zoologist sells a @item{Cat License} immediately; using it schedules a Town Cat to arrive at the next dawn (4:30 AM). Town pets have a specific @mechanic{Pet} dialogue option.

steps.text: Buy a @item{Cat License} from the @npc{Zoologist}, use it from your hotbar, and provide one vacant valid house.
After the @npc{Town Cat} arrives at dawn, use @mechanic{Open / Activate} on it and select the @mechanic{Pet} option; the petting animation triggers the achievement.

achievements.description: Encounter a fairy.
achievements.summary: Encounter a @enemy{Fairy}.

guide.context: Independent treasure-guiding Fairies can spawn in the Cavern layer only while at least one natural Fallen Log remains somewhere on the surface.

steps.text: Do not destroy every natural @item{Fallen Log}; explore the @loc{Cavern layer} until a pink, green, or blue @enemy{Fairy} appears and circles your character.
Move close enough for the Fairy to acknowledge you and begin leading toward treasure; that encounter triggers Hey! Listen!

achievements.description: What you're celebrating doesn't matter, just throw a party already!
achievements.summary: Throw a @mechanic{Party}.

guide.context: The Party Girl sells a Party Center for 20 gold. Activating the placed furniture manually starts or stops a Party and is the deterministic route.

steps.text: Buy a @item{Party Center} from the @npc{Party Girl} for @item{20 gold} and place it.
Use @mechanic{Open / Activate} on the Party Center while no Party is active; the confetti/background change confirms the Party and unlocks the achievement.

achievements.description: You were so preoccupied with whether or not you could open the chest that you didn't stop to think if you should.
achievements.summary: Open a booby-trapped @item{Dead Man's Chest} and die to its trap.

guide.context: A natural Dead Man's Chest is wired to several nearby traps. You must die within 10 seconds after opening the chest.

steps.text: Find a natural @item{Dead Man's Chest} underground; do not cut its wires or disarm the surrounding Boulder, Dart, and explosive traps.
Remove defensive gear or lower your health, stand in the trap zone, open the chest, and let the triggered trap kill you within @mechanic{10 seconds}.

achievements.description: Defeat Deerclops, the chilly one-eyed monstrosity from a foreign land.
achievements.summary: Defeat @enemy{Deerclops}, the one-eyed monstrosity.

guide.context: A Deer Thing summons Deerclops in a Snow biome at any time. Craft it at a Demon or Crimson Altar from 3 Flinx Fur, 5 Demonite or Crimtane Ore, and 1 Lens.

steps.text: Craft a @item{Deer Thing} from @item{3 Flinx Fur}, @item{5 Demonite/Crimtane Ore}, and @item{1 Lens} at a @item{Demon or Crimson Altar}.
Stand in a @loc{Snow biome}, use the Deer Thing at any time of day, and defeat the summoned @enemy{Deerclops}.

achievements.description: Obtain Golden Delight, the highest quality meal made from the highest quality . . . ingredients.
achievements.summary: Obtain @item{Golden Delight}, the highest-quality cooked meal.

guide.context: Golden Delight has a one-item recipe: any single golden critter or a @item{Golden Carp}, cooked at a @item{Cooking Pot} or @item{Cauldron}.

steps.text: Catch one golden critter with a @item{Bug Net} (for example a Gold Bunny, Gold Bird, or Gold Worm), or fish up one @item{Golden Carp}.
Stand beside a @item{Cooking Pot} or @item{Cauldron}, open crafting, and turn that single ingredient into @item{Golden Delight}.

achievements.description: Delay death from drowning by drinking water. It doesn't make much sense, but you did what you had to do.
achievements.summary: Drink @item{Bottled Water} while the drowning debuff is active.

guide.context: The breath meter must be fully empty and drowning must already be dealing health damage when the water is consumed.

steps.text: Place @item{Bottled Water} on the hotbar, submerge your head completely, and remain underwater until the breath bubbles vanish and your health starts ticking down.
While that drowning damage is active, select and consume the @item{Bottled Water}.

achievements.description: Obtain the Cell Phone. You'll never leave home without it again.
achievements.summary: Obtain the @item{Cell Phone}.

guide.context: Cell Phone is PDA plus Magic Mirror or Ice Mirror. Every bundle combination below is performed at a @item{Tinkerer's Workshop} unless a different station is named.

steps.text: Craft a Gold/Platinum Watch from 10 matching Bars plus a Chain at a Table and Chair. Loot a @item{Depth Meter} from Cave Bats and a @item{Compass} from Piranhas, then combine the three at the Workshop into @item{GPS}.

Find @item{Radar} in a Wooden Chest, loot @item{Tally Counter} from pre-Plantera Dungeon enemies, and buy @item{Lifeform Analyzer} from the Traveling Merchant; combine them at the Workshop into @item{R.E.K. 3000}.
Buy @item{DPS Meter} and @item{Stopwatch} from the Traveling Merchant, obtain @item{Metal Detector} from a Nymph, and combine those three at the Workshop into @item{Goblin Tech}.
Complete Angler quests until he has awarded @item{Fisherman's Pocket Guide}, @item{Weather Radio}, and @item{Sextant}; combine them at the Workshop into @item{Fish Finder}.
Use a @item{Tinkerer's Workshop} to turn the four completed bundles—@item{GPS}, @item{Fish Finder}, @item{Goblin Tech}, and @item{R.E.K. 3000}—into the @item{PDA}.
Find a @item{Magic Mirror} in an Underground Gold Chest, or an @item{Ice Mirror} in a Frozen Chest; combine either mirror with the @item{PDA} at the Workshop to craft the @item{Cell Phone}.

achievements.description: Obtain the Ankh Shield, the finest protection from unpleasant maladies and ailments.
achievements.summary: Obtain the @item{Ankh Shield}.

guide.context: The Ankh Shield combines an Ankh Charm with an Obsidian Shield at the Tinkerer's Workshop. The charm branch uses ten debuff-immunity drops paired into five accessories.

steps.text: Farm @item{Armor Polish} from Armored Skeletons and @item{Vitamins} from Corruptors/Floaty Grosses; join them at a @item{Tinkerer's Workshop} into @item{Armor Bracing}.
Obtain @item{Adhesive Bandage} from Werewolves or Rusty Armored Bones and @item{Bezoar} from Hornets/Moss Hornets; combine them into @item{Medicated Bandage}.
Loot @item{Nazar} from Cursed Skulls and @item{Megaphone} from Pixies or Green Jellyfish; combine them into @item{Countercurse Mantra}.
Get @item{Fast Clock} from Pixies/Wraiths/Mummies and @item{Trifold Map} from Giant Bats or Clowns; combine them into @item{The Plan}.
Obtain @item{Blindfold} from Dark Mummies/Corrupt Slimes/Crimslimes and @item{Pocket Mirror} from Medusas; combine them into @item{Reflective Shades}.

At the Workshop, merge @item{The Plan} and @item{Reflective Shades} with the other three completed pieces: @item{Armor Bracing}, @item{Countercurse Mantra}, and @item{Medicated Bandage}. This produces the @item{Ankh Charm}.
Loot a @item{Cobalt Shield} from a locked Dungeon Gold Chest, craft an @item{Obsidian Skull} from @item{20 Obsidian}, and combine them into an @item{Obsidian Shield}.
Combine @item{Ankh Charm} with @item{Obsidian Shield} at the @item{Tinkerer's Workshop} to craft @item{Ankh Shield}.

achievements.description: Invoked the wrath of the God of Torches, and survived long enough to earn its blessing.
achievements.summary: Use @item{Torch God's Favor} after surviving the Torch God event.

guide.context: Below the Surface layer, placing at least 101 ordinary torches inside a 41x41-tile area starts the Torch God event. The torches extinguish and fire 95 damaging projectiles; surviving awards @item{Torch God's Favor}, which must then be consumed for the achievement.

steps.text: Build a small arena below the @loc{Surface layer}, add movement space, then place at least @item{101 torches} within a @mechanic{41x41-tile area}.
Remain nearby as the torches extinguish and fire; dodge until all @mechanic{95 attacks} finish and @item{Torch God's Favor} drops into your inventory.
Select @item{Torch God's Favor} and use it to consume the item; receiving it without using it does not unlock the achievement.

achievements.description: Some very special seeds can lead to unique and rewarding experiences. Can you find one?
achievements.summary: Enter a world made with any @mechanic{secret seed}.

guide.context: The seed must be entered during world creation and the generated world must actually carry a special-seed attribute. The literal seed @mechanic{getfixedboi} is a reliable choice.

steps.text: Choose @mechanic{Single Player > New World}, enter @mechanic{getfixedboi} in the Seed field, finish creating the world, and load into it with any character.

achievements.description: Find all of the Slime Pets and have them move in!
achievements.summary: House @mechanic{all Town Slimes}.

guide.context: Unlock all eight Town Slimes in one world and keep eight valid houses available. The achievement triggers after the last one has moved in.

collectibles.name: Nerdy Slime
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{King Slime}; Nerdy Slime appears from the defeated boss.

collectibles.name: Squire Slime
collectibles.location: Where an ordinary slime can spawn
collectibles.method: Drop a @item{Copper Helmet} or @item{Copper Shortsword} directly onto a living ordinary slime enemy.

collectibles.name: Clumsy Slime
collectibles.method: Find a flying @enemy{Clumsy Balloon Slime} and attack its balloon until it breaks; do not kill the slime underneath.

collectibles.name: Surly Slime
collectibles.location: Any fishing pool during a @mechanic{Blood Moon}
collectibles.method: Fish during the Blood Moon until Surly Slime replaces a hooked Blood Moon enemy, then reel it in.

collectibles.name: Mystic Slime
collectibles.method: Find a @enemy{Mystic Frog} and use @item{Purification Powder} on it instead of attacking it.

collectibles.name: Elder Slime
collectibles.method: Find an @item{Old Shaking Chest} and use a @item{Golden Key} on it to release Elder Slime.

collectibles.name: Cool Slime
