collectibles.location: A town during a naturally occurring @mechanic{Party}
collectibles.method: Leave a valid empty house available and wait for a natural Party; a manually activated Party Center does not create this move-in condition.

collectibles.name: Diva Slime
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Queen Slime} for a @item{Sparkle Slime Balloon}, then throw the balloon item into @mechanic{Shimmer}.

achievements.description: Shimmer an item into another item. What other transmutations can you find?
achievements.summary: Transmute an item in @mechanic{Shimmer}.

guide.context: Shimmer is the pearlescent liquid in the underground @loc{Aether}. Many items have a defined transformation; a simple guaranteed pair is @item{Life Crystal} into @item{Vital Crystal}.

steps.text: Find the @loc{Aether}, stand beside its @mechanic{Shimmer} pool, open the inventory, and throw one @item{Life Crystal} into the liquid.
Wait for it to sink and transform into a @item{Vital Crystal}, then pick up the resulting item.

achievements.description: Completely purify all Corruption, Crimson, and Hallow from your world, until the Dryad is satisfied!
achievements.summary: Purify @mechanic{all Corruption, Crimson, and Hallow} until the Dryad is satisfied.

guide.context: Remove every Corruption, Crimson, and Hallow tile, then ask the Dryad for world status. Her percentages round down, so a displayed 0% before the final check may still hide contaminated blocks.

steps.text: Buy a @item{Clentaminator} from the @npc{Steampunker} and @item{Green Solution} from her while she is outside the Hallow; dig vertical tunnels roughly one spray-width apart across the world.
Spray both walls of every tunnel from Surface to Underworld, including the V-shaped Hardmode conversion, the edges of the Jungle, floating islands, and both Ocean borders.
steps.note: A post-Moon Lord @item{Terraformer} has greater range and is faster, but is not required.

steps.text: Sleep or wait for biome totals to update, talk to the @npc{Dryad}, and select @mechanic{Status}; repeat the scan until she explicitly confirms that Corruption, Crimson, and Hallow are completely gone.

achievements.description: Fly a Kwad Racer into outer space.
achievements.summary: Fly a @item{Kwad Racer Drone} out the top of the world.

guide.context: The @item{Kwad Racer Drone} is a remote-controlled novelty item, not a mount. The @npc{Cyborg} sells it for 10 gold after Plantera; your character stays in place while you pilot the drone.

steps.text: After defeating @enemy{Plantera}, house the @npc{Cyborg} and buy a @item{Kwad Racer Drone} from him for @item{10 gold}.
Stand near the top of the world, hold the drone, and use it to begin remote control; steer the drone straight upward while keeping the item in use.
Pilot the drone completely through the world's top border into outer space.

achievements.description: Catalogue every creature in the world.
achievements.summary: Complete the @mechanic{Bestiary} to 100%.

guide.context: Bestiary progress belongs to the world, not the character. All 546 entries must be unlocked in that same world; one kill is enough for an enemy entry, approaching is enough for a critter, and opening dialogue is enough for an NPC.

steps.text: Open the @mechanic{Bestiary}, sort by @mechanic{Unlocks}, and work through the grey entries: kill each missing enemy or boss once, approach each missing critter, and open dialogue with each missing NPC.

Buy opposite-evil seeds from the @npc{Dryad} while she is in a Hardmode Graveyard. Build that evil's @loc{Surface} and ordinary @loc{Underground} zones, both @loc{Desert} layers (surface and underground), and an @loc{Ice} variant; encounter each unique enemy/critter there.

Reach wave 15 of @mechanic{Pumpkin Moon} for one in-game day of Halloween and wave 15 of @mechanic{Frost Moon} for one day of Christmas. Defeat @mechanic{Frost Legion} so @npc{Santa Claus} can move in during Christmas, then open his dialogue for his entry.

Unlock the ambient-event filters during @mechanic{Party}, @mechanic{Windy Day}, @mechanic{Rain}, @mechanic{Sandstorm}, @loc{Graveyard}, and after a @mechanic{Meteor} lands. During a Blood Moon, also fish up and defeat @enemy{Dreadnautilus}, @enemy{Hemogoblin Shark}, @enemy{Blood Eel}, @enemy{Zombie Merman}, and @enemy{Wandering Eye Fish}.

Kill every grey entry during Goblin Invasion, Old One's Army, Pirate Invasion, Martian Madness, Solar Eclipse, Pumpkin Moon, Frost Moon, and Frost Legion; also clear the Nebula, Solar, Vortex, and Stardust Pillar enemy lists.
Visit every remaining ordinary biome/layer in pre-Hardmode and Hardmode, defeat each boss once, and use Bestiary biome/time filters to isolate every still-grey entry.
Reopen the Bestiary after each batch and continue until its bottom progress bar reads @mechanic{100%}; extra kills used to reveal drop rates are not required.
steps.note: Use each unknown entry's displayed biome/time filters to identify the remaining category before consulting the full Bestiary list.

achievements.description: Prove your worth against the Moon Lord's worst.
achievements.summary: Take down the @enemy{Moon Lord} inside a @mechanic{For the Worthy} (or getfixedboi) world.

guide.context: For the Worthy worlds are much harder, and the Moon Lord there throws boulders as an extra attack. The Zenith/getfixedboi seed also counts.

steps.text: Beat the campaign in a @mechanic{For the Worthy} (or @mechanic{getfixedboi}) world.
Defeat the @enemy{Moon Lord} there, dodging his boulder barrage.

achievements.description: Defeated the combined form of the 3 mechanical giants.
achievements.summary: Defeat @enemy{Mechdusa}, the fused form of the three mechanical bosses.

guide.context: Mechdusa is available only when both For the Worthy and Remix attributes are active; getfixedboi/Zenith supplies both. Ocram's Razor combines all three normal mechanical summon items, and Mechdusa does not count for Mecha Mayhem.

steps.text: Enter a world carrying both @mechanic{For the Worthy} and @mechanic{Remix} (a @mechanic{getfixedboi} world is simplest).
At a @item{Mythril or Orichalcum Anvil}, combine a @item{Mechanical Eye}, @item{Mechanical Worm}, and @item{Mechanical Skull} into @item{Ocram's Razor}.
Use @item{Ocram's Razor} in the qualifying world to summon @enemy{Mechdusa}, then destroy all fused boss parts.
steps.note: She can also appear on her own at dusk (1/20) once an altar is smashed and the mech bosses are still alive.

achievements.description: Take a ride in your final resting place.
achievements.summary: Ride a @item{Coffin Minecart} on rails.

guide.context: Craft the Coffin Minecart at an anvil inside a Graveyard biome, then ride it.

steps.text: At a @loc{Graveyard} anvil, build a @item{Coffin Minecart} from 5 Iron/Lead Bars, 10 Wood and 10 Vertebrae or Rotten Chunks.
Lay @item{track} and ride the coffin minecart.

achievements.description: Dawn the garb of a vampire and get a sunburn.
achievements.summary: Wear the @item{Vampire set} and get a sunburn.

guide.context: The full Vampire set comes from Goodie Bags during Halloween. The Vampirism seed makes characters burn in daylight, and the set must remain visible rather than being overridden by other vanity gear or a transformation.

steps.text: During Halloween (naturally, or the day after reaching Pumpkin Moon wave 15), kill ordinary enemies for @item{Goodie Bags} and open them until the three-piece Vampire set drops: Pants, Mask, and Shirt.
Create the @mechanic{Vampirism} seed world, equip all three Vampire pieces visibly, and remove any item that changes or hides their appearance.
Step onto the surface in daytime and let the seed's curse @mechanic{burn} you.

achievements.description: Survive the dreaded rain of boulders.
achievements.summary: Survive the dreaded @mechanic{Boulder Rain}.

guide.context: Boulder Rain falls during a @mechanic{Thunderstorm} within a world that merges @mechanic{Drunk} with @mechanic{For the Worthy}. Shelter in a box and wait it out; in Journey mode you can max out wind and rain to force the storm.

steps.text: Enter a world combining @mechanic{Drunk} and @mechanic{For the Worthy}, then bring on a @mechanic{Thunderstorm} so @mechanic{Boulder Rain} starts.
Survive the boulder storm inside a protective box.

achievements.description: Die as a hardcore character and survive to tell the tale.
achievements.summary: Die as a @mechanic{Hardcore} character and live to tell the tale.

guide.context: The Constant, combined with @mechanic{Celebrationmk10}, hands a Hardcore character a one-time revival: rather than being deleted on death, you respawn with a permanent max-health cut (stay above 60 max health to survive it).

steps.text: Roll a @mechanic{Hardcore} character in a world that combines @mechanic{Celebrationmk10} and @mechanic{The Constant}.
Let that character die once — The Constant revives you instead of ending the run.

achievements.description: “Accidentally” kill a friend with your tombstone.
achievements.summary: 'Accidentally' kill a friend with your @item{tombstone}.

guide.context: In a @mechanic{For the Worthy} world, tombstones are hazardous. When you die beside a @npc{town NPC} or teammate, the grave that drops can crush them.

steps.text: In a @mechanic{For the Worthy} world, die right next to a @npc{town NPC} or teammate so your @item{tombstone} lands on and kills them.

achievements.description: Jam out on a six stringed instrument.
achievements.summary: Play a @item{six-string guitar} instrument.

guide.context: Any guitar or @item{The Axe} counts. The simplest explicit farm is @item{Rain Song}, a 1/100 drop from @enemy{Flying Fish}, which spawn on the Surface while it rains.

steps.text: During rain, kill @enemy{Flying Fish} on the @loc{Surface} until @item{Rain Song} drops, then place the instrument on the hotbar.
Select the instrument and press @mechanic{Use / Attack} once so your character visibly plays it.

achievements.description: Find the ultra rare Rod of Discord.
achievements.summary: Obtain the ultra-rare @item{Rod of Discord}.

guide.context: Chaos Elementals require Hardmode and spawn in the Cavern layer only on Pearlstone, Pearlsand, or Pink Ice. Nearby town NPCs and safe background walls prevent normal spawning, and the player must have moved or used an item within the last five seconds unless a Shadow Candle is present.

steps.text: Build a @loc{Cavern-layer} platform from @item{Pearlstone}, @item{Pearlsand}, or @item{Pink Ice}; remove player-placed walls and keep all town NPCs away.
Keep walking/jumping or repeatedly use an item so the activity check stays valid, then kill spawning @enemy{Chaos Elementals} until @item{Rod of Discord} drops.
steps.note: Drop chance is low — expect a long farm.

achievements.description: Spot the sun on a “cool” day.
achievements.summary: Wear @item{Sunglasses} in the sun on a clear day.

guide.context: Craft @item{Sunglasses} from 2 Black Lenses and wear them in a vanity slot. The check requires a non-Remix world, a position above the Surface, no rain, and daylight after 5:30 AM but before 6:30 PM.

steps.text: In a world without the @mechanic{Remix} attribute, equip the crafted @item{Sunglasses} in a vanity slot and stand above the Surface after @mechanic{5:30 AM} but before @mechanic{6:30 PM}, with no rain active.

achievements.description: Discover a friendly boulder.
achievements.summary: Activate a @item{Rainbow Boulder}.

guide.context: At a Crystal Ball, fuse a Boulder together with 50 Fallen Stars to create the Rainbow Boulder, then set it off by removing the block beneath it or striking it with a pickaxe.

steps.text: At a @item{Crystal Ball}, combine a @item{Boulder} with @item{50 Fallen Stars} into a @item{Rainbow Boulder}.
Activate it by knocking out its support block or hitting it with a @item{pickaxe}.

achievements.description: Get your villagers fully combat ready.
achievements.summary: Make your villagers fully combat-ready with both @item{Advanced Combat Techniques} books.

guide.context: The two permanent town-NPC upgrades may be consumed in either order. The original book is a rare catch while fishing during a Blood Moon; Volume Two is made by transmuting a Spell Tome in Shimmer.

steps.text: During a @mechanic{Blood Moon}, fish in any valid pool until you catch @item{Advanced Combat Techniques}; keep the book rather than selling it.
After the @npc{Wizard} moves in, buy a @item{Spell Tome}, throw it into @mechanic{Shimmer}, and collect @item{Advanced Combat Techniques: Volume Two}.
Select and use both books from the inventory (either order); each disappears and applies its permanent world upgrade.

achievements.description: Become a Moon Lord impersonator.
achievements.summary: Wear the full @item{Moon Lord vanity set} at once.

guide.context: The pieces come from three routes: Moon Lord drops the Mask, For the Worthy Dungeon Chests/Golden Lock Boxes contain the Torso, and Drunk-world chests contain the Legs. A @mechanic{getfixedboi/Zenith} world carries both required seed attributes and can supply both chest pieces.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Moon Lord} until the @item{Moon Lord Mask} drops; obtain the @item{Moon Lord Torso} from a Dungeon Chest or Golden Lock Box in a @mechanic{For the Worthy} world.
Loot @item{Moon Lord Legs} from a chest in a @mechanic{Drunk} world, then equip Mask, Torso, and Legs together in the three vanity slots.

achievements.description: Scare your villagers with a stink bug sword.
achievements.summary: Scare a villager with a @item{Flymeal} stink-bug sword.

guide.context: Craft the Flymeal from a Platinum/Gold Broadsword and 5 Stinkbugs at Honey, then hit any Town NPC with it.

steps.text: Craft the @item{Flymeal} (@item{Gold/Platinum Broadsword} + @item{5 Stinkbugs} at Honey).
Strike a @npc{town NPC} once with it.

achievements.description: Give any villager a new look.
achievements.summary: Give a villager a new look by soaking them in @mechanic{Shimmer}.

guide.context: Submerging any town NPC in Shimmer permanently switches that NPC type to its alternate appearance. The @item{Shimmer Gun} also works.

steps.text: Build a valid house beside the @loc{Aether}, assign any @npc{town NPC} to it, and create a safe route from the house into the @mechanic{Shimmer} pool.
Push or lure the NPC until its body is submerged in Shimmer; wait for the transformation effect and alternate sprite. A @item{Shimmer Gun} hit is an equivalent route.

achievements.description: Embark on a one way trip into outer space.
achievements.summary: Leave a qualifying special-seed world through its upper border.

guide.context: This needs a @mechanic{Remix} seed (including getfixedboi), or a For the Worthy world while a phase-two Brain of Cthulhu is within 250 tiles. Crossing the upper border kills the character unless Godmode is active, so do not use a Hardcore character for the normal route.

steps.text: Play a @mechanic{Remix} seed (or a @mechanic{getfixedboi} world).
Store valuables, climb to the top edge, and continue upward until the character fully leaves the world boundary; the achievement appears as the lethal space transition occurs.

achievements.description: Bring back the original title screen.
achievements.summary: Bring back the @mechanic{original title screen}.

guide.context: From the title screen, clicking the sun restores its classic old-school look.

steps.text: On the main menu, tap the @mechanic{sun} to swap it back.

achievements.description: Craft the final upgrade to the Cell Phone.
achievements.summary: Craft the @item{Shellphone}, the final Cell Phone upgrade.

guide.context: The final workshop recipe joins three teleport tools. Find a @item{Magic Conch} in Sandstone Chests/Oasis Crates, obtain a @item{Demon Conch} by lava fishing, and first finish a @item{Cell Phone}.

steps.text: Search @loc{Underground Desert} Sandstone Chests or fish Oasis/Mirage Crates for a @item{Magic Conch}.
Use lava-capable fishing gear to fish in lava until you obtain a @item{Demon Conch}.

Bring all three to a @item{Tinkerer's Workshop} and craft the @item{Shellphone} using the @item{Demon Conch}, @item{Cell Phone}, and @item{Magic Conch}; cycle it to @item{Shellphone (Home)}. If it does not trigger immediately, throw out that Home variant and pick it back up.

achievements.description: Research 50% of all items in Journey Mode.
achievements.summary: Catalogue half of every item (~3,043) through @mechanic{Journey Mode} research.

guide.context: Journey Mode has 6,087 researchable items; at least 3,043 different items must be fully researched so each is available for duplication. Depositing fewer than an item's required stack does not count that item.

steps.text: Create a @mechanic{Journey Mode} character/world, open the duplication menu, and deposit each item's displayed required quantity until that item becomes duplicable.
Repeat with distinct items until the fully researched total reaches @mechanic{3,043}; partial research progress does not advance the achievement count.

achievements.description: Support sustainable logging by planting 100 acorns.
achievements.summary: Plant @mechanic{100 acorns} to grow new trees.

guide.context: Only trees you plant directly advance the counter. Valid starters include @item{Acorns} and @item{Gemcorns}, as well as @item{Yellow Willow Saplings} or @item{Sakura Saplings}; natural generation does not count.

steps.text: Clear level ground with appropriate grass and enough open space, then place @item{Acorns} one by one until @mechanic{100 trees} have been directly planted.

achievements.description: Give the Dryad a can of Joja Cola.
achievements.summary: Ask the @npc{Dryad} to purify a fished-up @item{Joja Cola}.

guide.context: Joja Cola is a junk catch from fishing. The special Dryad interaction appears only while the item is in your inventory.

steps.text: Fish with low fishing power in a small valid pond until the junk item @item{Joja Cola} is caught; keep it in your main inventory.
Use @mechanic{Open / Activate} on the @npc{Dryad} and select the special @mechanic{Purify} option; she consumes the cola and gives a @item{Stardrop}.
